author: IGN YouTube
text:
Everything is Gun! - Official Gameplay Trailer
Get a look at the Gameplay Trailer for Everything is Gun!, a first-person arcade action boomer shooter game developed by Incineration Productions. Players will acquire modifications for themselves to become the ultimate weapon. Take on runs, slay enemies, and survive while being broadcast for all to see. Everything is Gun! is coming soon to PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mistfall Hunter - Official Open Beta Gameplay Trailer
Check out the Open Beta Gameplay Trailer for Mistfall Hunter, an upcoming third-person action souls-like RPG developed by Bellring Games. Players can check out new gameplay from the demo, showing off intense combat, epic boss battles, and a suite of abilities. Mistfall Hunter is available now in the open beta for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with the full game launching on July 29.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum - Official Casting Announcement
'Welcome to the hunt, Anya Taylor-Joy.' Check out The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum casting announcement video as Anya Taylor-Joy will play Seren in the upcoming fantasy film. The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum also stars Ian McKellen as Gandalf, Elijah Wood as Frodo, Lee Pace as Thranduil, Jamie Dornan as Aragorn, and Andy Serkis as Gollum. 

The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum opens in theaters on December 17, 2027.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Overwatch - Official Season 3: Into the Tiger's Den Trailer
Take a look at the Season 3: Into the Tiger's Den Trailer for Overwatch, the hit action first-person team-based hero shooter developed by Blizzard. Players can take on the new season with Shion, the latest Damage Hero wielding dual semi-auto pistols, the new Neon Junction map, the Season 3 Battle Pass, and more. Season 3: Into the Tiger's Den is launching on June 16 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mistfall Hunter - Official 'Withered Knight' Class Trailer
Check out the 'Withered Knight' Class Trailer for Mistfall Hunter, a dark fantasy action extraction shooter developed by Bellring Games. Players can get a look at the new playable class, the Withered Knight, armed with two-handed greatswords to excel in mid-range and pull off counters. Fight as the Withered Knight in Mistfall Hunter, available now in the open beta for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with the full game launching on July 29.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Division 2: Into the Dark - Official Launch Trailer
Agents, it's time to venture into the dark. Watch the The Division 2: Into the Dark launch trailer to see what's coming in the new season of the third-person action co-op shooter game. In the new season of The Division 2, Hyenas flood the streets with a stronger, new supply of Spice, and Agents must go into the Dark Zones to fight back. Explore refreshed Dark Zones featuring weekly rotations, including a new PvE experience and a major PvP update across all modes. Additionally, a new Incursion will be available later this season. The Division 2's Into the Dark season features rotating Dark Zones, all-new Classified Assignments, a new Season Pass, and the upcoming Incursion. The Division 2: Into the Dark launches on June 16, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Jurassic World Evolution 3 - Official Distortus Rex Trailer
Meet the Distortus rex in this latest Jurassic World Evolution 3 for the dinosaur park management sim game. The Distortus rex is the first of its kind with unique kill animations and immense aggression. Challenge your facility’s security against a relentless dinosaur that puts staff safety to the ultimate test. The Jurassic World Evolution 3: Rebirth Expansion will be available on PC, Xbox Series X/S, and PlayStation 5 (PS5) on June 16, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Relic: First Guardian - Official PC and PS5 Release Date Trailer
The Relic: First Guardian gets a new trailer and a release date announcement for PC and PS5. Watch the latest The Relic: First Guardian trailer for this upcoming action RPG to see brutal gameplay and more. Get ready to embark on a heroic fantasy adventure. The Relic: First Guardian will be available on PC via Steam and PlayStation 5 (PS5) on July 31, 2026. It is coming to Xbox Series X/S and Nintendo Switch 2 later in summer 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Frostpunk 2: Breach of Trust - Official New Scenario Trailer
Watch the Frostpunk 2: Breach of Trust trailer as the second expansion DLC for society survival city-builder presents an all-new scenario, placing players in the centre of turmoil in New Edinburgh. As the First Citizen, you'll be subject to periodic Votes of Trust. But the toughest test arrives once Aurora - a nearby colony set on a frozen lake - proves to be the only possible safe haven for the city's people. Then comes the choice: trust or force. Unity or control. Breach of Trust features a new story exploring the fate of New Edingburgh, 5 unique communities and factions, lethal new environmental hazards, new narrative events, Independent Colony, 2 new scenario maps, 5 new buildings and hubs to reinforce your city's infrastructure, and new laws. 

The Frostpunk 2: Breach of Trust expansion will be available on PC, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X/S on June 23, 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Brawlhalla x DreamWorks Animation Shrek - Official Crossover Event Announcement Trailer
Take a look at the announcement trailer for Brawlhalla  x DreamWorks Animation’s Shrek crossover event. Ubisoft, in collaboration with Universal Products & Experiences, announced the crossover event launching on July 29. This collaboration brings the films’ unforgettable characters—Shrek, Fiona, and Puss in Boots—from the beloved franchise to  Brawlhalla as playable characters, with Donkey as a Companion. The event will also include a Map featuring Shrek’s iconic Swamp and other items inspired by fairy tale creatures. Additional details on the crossover and those other Items will be shared at a later date. The Brawlhalla  x Shrek crossover event is launching on July 29.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dark Stream - Official Reveal Trailer
Take a look at the Reveal Trailer for Dark Stream, a first-person adventure horror game developed by RedDeer.Games. Players will embody a content creator willing to do anything to get more concurrents and climb the charts. Explore a haunted house, make sense of paranormal activity, and survive all while being live on stream. Dark Stream is coming soon to PC (Steam), with a demo available now on Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Xbox Game Studios Boss Departs - IGN Daily Fix YT
Head of Xbox Game Studios Craig Duncan and chief of staff Louise O'Connor are leaving Xbox after decades at the firm. Plus, Microsoft is reportedly planning to shut down South of Midnight and We Happy Few developer Compulsion Games. Daemon has all that and more on your Daily Fix.

Presented by Universal Orlando Resort, and its new theme park, Universal Epic Universe.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
There was an F1-inspired racing event at IGN Live. Presented by @lenovolegion
Subscribe to IGN for more!
http://www.youtube.com/user/IGNentertainment?sub_confirmation=1

#IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Kingdom Rush 6: Genesis - Official Reveal Trailer
Don't miss the Reveal Trailer for Kingdom Rush 6: Genesis, a fantasy tower defense strategy game developed by Ironhide Game Studio. Players will witness the early days of the Kingdom and face waves of enemies from the perspective of young Vez’nan. Choose powerful warriors, defend royal towers, and make tactical moves to win the battle. Kingdom Rush 6: Genesis is launching on September 24 for iOS, Android, and PC (Steam), with a demo available now on Steam.
